_comment: Institution registry — single source of truth for sector labels, full names, and corpus status. Update here; all analysis scripts and table generators should read from this file.
_labelNote: PU = Public University (Universities Act 1997); TU = Technological University (TU Act 2018); IT = Institute of Technology; CE = College of Education; PS = Private/Specialised

institutions.notes: Selenium scraper (CourseLeaf JS-rendered)

institutions.assessmentData: hub.ucd.ie (component type + weight; no LO index)
institutions.notes: GÉANT SSL fix; 31.2% null LOs — genuine quality issue
37.8% null — artefact issue
Decentralised catalogue; John investigating school-level pages

institutions.loCountNote: Deduplicated: 35,762 cross-programme duplicates removed (51.4%). 622 shared-code variants retained with v2/v3 suffix.

institutions.notes: PDF extraction
Akari ID sweep 1–25,000; gold standard for alignment analysis
Aims format only — no student-centred LOs on public pages. loType flag distinguishes aims/explicit/none. 49.3% hit rate from 5,449 URLs.

institutions.fullName: Technological University of the Shannon: Midlands Midwest
institutions.notes: Awaiting data from TU colleague. Designated 2021 from Athlone IT + Limerick IT.
D1 mean 1.644 — sits in university cluster range rather than TU cluster. IoT transitional status may explain. 10 confirmed Type A, 67 partially rescued, 8 Type B.
Linked to UL. Teacher education tradition — LO language expected to be distinctive.
Linked to DCU.

institutions.fullName: Church of Ireland College of Education
institutions.notes: Linked to TCD.

institutions.fullName: Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland
institutions.notes: University status; professional/medical focus
institutions.scrapeNote: Akari confirmed (rcsi.akarisoftware.com or similar) but password-protected. Access route: FOI request or direct Registry contact for Akari bulk export. FOI template in plan.

institutions.fullName: National College of Art and Design
institutions.notes: Linked to UCD. Arts/design — LO language likely distinctive.
Akari publicly accessible at nci.akarisoftware.com (no login). 759 IDs harvested via showModulesListByFOS AJAX endpoint. 3s delay to avoid WAF block.
institutions.scrapeNote: scrape-nci-akari.mjs; targeted 759-ID list; pipeline-nci.mjs complete. Type A: 2 confirmed, 26 partially rescued.

institutions.notes: UL is the degree-awarding body. MIC modules are in the UL Book of Modules. 64 confirmed unique MIC modules (MH/GY/RS prefixes). Education programmes (B.Ed/PME) mapped to ED/EM shared codes — cannot cleanly separate without department tags. Treated as part of UL corpus in analysis.

institutions.fullName: Church of Ireland College of Education
institutions.notes: CICE (+ St Patrick's College + Mater Dei Institute) incorporated into DCU in 2016 as DCU Institute of Education. 608 modules / 2,320 LOs confirmed in DCU corpus under faculty='DCU Institute of Education'. No separate scraping needed.

4 programme handbooks parsed (B.Ed. Primary, BSc ECE, BSc Ed. Studies, B.Oid.). 163 modules total; only 14 (8.6%) have student-centred LOs — remainder description-only. BSc Ed. Studies has 0 LOs. D1 mean from 49 English LOs only. B.Oid. (33 modules) is Irish-medium; excluded from D1. Zero Tier 0.
institutions.scrapeNote: parse-mie-pdfs.py; 4 PDFs from mie.ie; pipeline-mie.mjs complete

institutions.fullName: National College of Art and Design
institutions.assessmentData: PDF-parsed (assessment components extracted; zero exam-based assessment confirmed across corpus)
institutions.notes: Linked to UCD. 104 PDFs downloaded via mass spider. 79 module descriptors parsed (25 non-module docs skipped). D1 mean 1.796 — highest in corpus; reflects performative LO language in art & design. Zero formal examinations. LO skill-category prefixes (RESEARCH:, ANALYSE:, COMMUNICATE:) preserved in loText.

institutions.fullName: Dún Laoghaire Institute of Art, Design and Technology
institutions.notes: Erasmus module catalogue PDF (122 pages, 14 programmes). Retrieved from iadt.ie/content/files/modules_catalogue.pdf. D1 mean 1.776 — sits in TU cluster range.
PDF module descriptors scraped from griffith.ie programme pages. 63 modules, 441 LOs.
